summary: High‑quality soundboard capture of a fiery 1992 jam with Jerry in top form and a standout Space featuring the Ollin Arageed theme.
review: Both reviewers rave about the performance, noting that Jerry Garcia was "very Dead" and that the band delivered a gem of jamming. The recording sounds clean enough to be an enjoyable listen, highlighted by an especially compelling Space segment with the Ollin Arageed motif.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews give 4‑star ratings and praise the musical performance; no recording problems are mentioned, suggesting a good show on a decent soundboard source.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No complaints about clarity or balance; listeners describe it as a pleasant and clean listening experience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Overall strong performance with a particularly memorable Space segment; the show flows smoothly and keeps the listener engaged.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as "very Dead" and delivering top‑form guitar work.
